action.reasoning: Observation: 21.18% accuracy, above published SOTA. Analysis: More aggressive sketch augmentations and ensemble with DINOv2 could push higher. Decision: Increase sketch augmentation probability dramatically (70%+), train for 15 epochs, also prepare DINOv2 training.
